summary: Critical issue: workflow duplicates 3 identical jobs (bump-patch lines 8-25, bump-minor 27-44, bump-major 46-63; only fixture file and expected value differ). Should use matrix strategy. Script missing Set-StrictMode and $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; error handling inconsistent (throw in functions but Write-Error/exit at main level). Main guard logic on line 81 using $MyInvocation.InvocationName is unconventional/fragile. Functions well-designed but error handling needs audit.
